Transcrição Completa: 9 My Business Partner I Will Need To Review This
[00:00] Next objection. My business partner and I will need to review this together before we move forward.
[00:06] Sounds fair to me. Do you want to schedule a follow-up call together tomorrow morning or tomorrow afternoon with your business partner on?
[00:14] That way we can get all the questions answered.
[00:17] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Business Partner Question Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Tomorrow morning/afternoon options
VISUAL: Dois parceiros de negócios em discussão, calendário mostrando opções de agendamento para manhã ou tarde do dia seguinte
[00:18] Hey, I got to get my business partner and I to review this before we move forward on this.
[00:23] Sounds fair to me. What questions do you think they'd have that I can answer for you today after I get those questions answered?
[00:31] Great. Glad I was able to answer those for you.
[00:34] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Three-Way Call Setup"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Configuração de chamada de três vias, ícones de telefone conectando três pessoas, urgência de incentivos por ação rápida
[00:35] Do you think we'll be able to schedule a call tomorrow morning or tomorrow afternoon with your business partner so we can get this deal closed?
[00:43] I'm looking forward to being able to help you guys out and I would hate for you to lose out on our fast action incentives.
[00:50] 📊 SLIDE DETECTADO
─────────────────────────────
TEXTO: "Partnership Call Strategy"
NÚMEROS: Não especificados numericamente
VISUAL: Estratégia de incluir parceiro na chamada desde o início vs lidar com surpresa no final, fluxo de processo otimizado
[00:52] Get the person on the phone with them. Should have done that initially, but if the business partner comes as a surprise at the end, get them on a call together. that we can get the deal closed.
